channel.title: The Rest of the Record — HPD Class C Violations
channel.description: The Rest of the Record feed: The Rest of the Record — HPD Class C Violations

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 900 HOE AVENUE, Apt 4B, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
HMC ADM CODE: § 27-2017.4 ABATE THE INFESTATION CONSISTING OF MICE IN THE ENTIRE APARTMENT LOCATED AT APT 4B, 4th STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM SOUTH AT WEST , SECTION ''NORTH''

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 900 HOE AVENUE, Apt 4B, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
HMC ADM CODE: § 27-2017.4 ABATE THE INFESTATION CONSISTING OF ROACHES IN THE ENTIRE APARTMENT LOCATED AT APT 4B, 4th STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM SOUTH AT WEST , SECTION ''NORTH''

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 3929 CARPENTER AVENUE, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005, 2007 ADM CODE REMOVE THE ILLEGAL FASTENING CONSISTING OF PANIC BAR INSTALLED AT ROOF DOOR THAT DOSE NOT ALLOW RE-ENTRY FROM ROOF TO PUBLIC HALL AT BULKHEAD , 6th STORY

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 707 ST NICHOLAS AVENUE, Apt 5B, MANHATTAN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005 ADM CODE & 309 M/D LAW ABATE THE NUISANCE CONSISTING OF HOT WATER TEMPERATURE EXCEEDING OVER 130F DEGREE AT ALL HOT WATER FIXTURES THROUGHOUT IN THE ENTIRE APARTMENT LOCATED AT APT 5B, 5th STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM WEST AT NORTH

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 47-06 45 STREET, Apt B2, QUEENS
item.description:
Outcome: Open
HMC ADM CODE: § 27-2017.4 ABATE THE INFESTATION CONSISTING OF ROACHES IN THE ENTIRE APARTMENT LOCATED AT APT B2, 2nd STORY, 2nd APARTMENT FROM EAST AT SOUTH

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 22-45 DIX AVENUE, QUEENS
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005, 27-2007, 27-2041.1 HMC, §238, § 309; § 107 (2) ( C) MDL AND 28 RCNY §25-171: REPLACE OR REPAIR THE SELF-CLOSING DOORS THAT IS MISSING OR DEFECTIVE LATCH AT COMPACTOR CLOSET DOOR AT PUBLIC HALL, 1st STORY

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 3929 CARPENTER AVENUE, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005, 27-2007, 27-2041.1 HMC, §238, § 309; § 107 (2) ( C) MDL AND 28 RCNY §25-171: REPLACE OR REPAIR THE SELF-CLOSING DOORS THAT IS MISSING OR DEFECTIVE DOOR FRAME AT BULKHEAD , 6th STORY

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 47-06 45 STREET, QUEENS
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2026 ADM CODE REPAIR THE LEAKY AND/OR DEFECTIVE WATER SUPPLY PIPE AT CEILING, REAR SECTION AT CELLAR

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 47-06 45 STREET, QUEENS
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2026 ADM CODE REPAIR THE LEAKY AND/OR DEFECTIVE WATER SUPPLY PIPE WITHIN STORAGE ROOM AT CELLAR

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 707 ST NICHOLAS AVENUE, Apt 2D, MANHATTAN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005 ADM CODE & 309 M/D LAW ABATE THE NUISANCE CONSISTING OF HOT WATER TEMPERATURE EXCEEDING OVER 130F DEGREE AT ALL HOT WATER FIXTURES THROUGHOUT IN THE ENTIRE APARTMENT LOCATED AT APT 2D, 2nd STORY, 3rd APARTMENT FROM WEST AT NORTH

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 545 EAST 144 STREET, Apt 14F, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
HMC ADM CODE: § 27-2017.4 ABATE THE INFESTATION CONSISTING OF ROACHES IN THE ENTIRE APARTMENT LOCATED AT APT 14F, 14th STORY, 4th APARTMENT FROM SOUTH AT WEST

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 2757 CLAFLIN AVENUE, Apt 6D, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2056.6 ADM CODE - CORRECT THE LEAD-BASED PAINT HAZARD-PAINT THAT IS PEELING OR ON A DETERIORATED SUBSURFACE AND EITHER TESTED INCONCLUSIVE FOR LEAD CONTENT AT 0.5MG/CM2 OR TESTED POSITIVE FOR LEAD CONTENT ON A METAL OR CERAMIC SUBSTRATE AS SET FORTH IN (28 RCNY §11-07(b)) USING WORK PRACTICES SET FORTH IN 28 RCNY §11-06(b)(2). EAST WALL IN THE 2nd PRIVATE HALLWAY FROM EAST LOCATED AT APT 6D,

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 2757 CLAFLIN AVENUE, Apt 6D, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 3101 BRIGHTON 2 STREET, Apt 1D, BROOKLYN
item.description:
Outcome: Open

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 2277 BATHGATE AVENUE, Apt 11A, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2017.3 HMC: TRACE AND REPAIR THE SOURCE AND ABATE THE VISIBLE MOLD CONDITION... GREATER THAN 10 SQ.FT. AT CEILING AND ALL WALLS IN THE BATHROOM LOCATED AT APT 11A, 11th STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM WEST AT NORTH ORIGINAL VIOLATION 18711082 ISSUED 14-MAR-26 HAS BEEN UPGRADED TO CLASS C PER ADMINISTRATIVE CODE 27-2017.3a(5)(a) or (b).

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 1321 ST JOHNS PLACE, Apt 1L, BROOKLYN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2017.3 HMC: TRACE AND REPAIR THE SOURCE AND ABATE THE VISIBLE MOLD CONDITION... GREATER HAN 10 SQ FT AT EAST WALL IN THE KITCHEN LOCATED AT APT 1L, 1st STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM WEST AT NORTH ORIGINAL VIOLATION 18663226 ISSUED 17-FEB-26 HAS BEEN UPGRADED TO CLASS C PER ADMINISTRATIVE CODE 27-2017.3a(5)(a) or (b).

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 1321 ST JOHNS PLACE, Apt 1L, BROOKLYN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2017.3 HMC: TRACE AND REPAIR THE SOURCE AND ABATE THE VISIBLE MOLD CONDITION... GREATER THAN 10 SQFT AT WEST AND EAST WALL IN THE BATHROOM LOCATED AT APT 1L, 1st STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM WEST AT NORTH ORIGINAL VIOLATION 18657758 ISSUED 17-FEB-26 HAS BEEN UPGRADED TO CLASS C PER ADMINISTRATIVE CODE 27-2017.3a(5)(a) or (b).

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 1321 ST JOHNS PLACE, Apt 1L, BROOKLYN
item.description:

§ 27-2017.3 HMC: TRACE AND REPAIR THE SOURCE AND ABATE THE VISIBLE MOLD CONDITION... item.title: HPD Class C violation — 2334 TIEBOUT AVENUE, Apt 5A, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2017.3 HMC: TRACE AND REPAIR THE SOURCE AND ABATE THE VISIBLE MOLD CONDITION... APPROX 10 SQFT OF MOLD AT 2ND WINDOW FRAME FROM NORTH AT WEST. IN THE 1st ROOM FROM EAST AT SOUTH LOCATED AT APT 5A, 5th STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM NORTH AT EAST , SECTION AT SOUTH ORIGINAL VIOLATION 16962445 ISSUED 06-MAY-24 HAS BEEN UPGRADED TO CLASS C PER ADMINISTRATIVE CODE 27-2017.3a(5)(a) or (b).

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 1089 EASTERN PARKWAY, Apt 7B, BROOKLYN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2017.3 HMC: TRACE AND REPAIR THE SOURCE AND ABATE THE VISIBLE MOLD CONDITION... ALL WALLS AND CEILING 10 SQ FT IN THE BATHROOM LOCATED AT APT 7B, 2nd STORY, 2nd APARTMENT FROM WEST AT NORTH ORIGINAL VIOLATION 13247064 ISSUED 26-AUG-19 HAS BEEN UPGRADED TO CLASS C PER ADMINISTRATIVE CODE 27-2017.3a(5)(a) or (b).

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 73-12 35 AVENUE, Apt E05, QUEENS
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2056.7 ADM CODE: CORRECT FAILURE TO PROVIDE TO THE DEPARTMENT WITHIN 45 DAYS OF DEMAND ALL RECORDS REQUIRED TO BE MAINTAINED BY OWNER PURSUANT TO LOCAL LAW 1 OF 2004 RELATED TO LEAD-BASED PAINT NOTICES, INSPECTIONS AND REMEDIATION/ABATEMENT ACTIVITIES.

item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2056.6 ADM CODE - CORRECT THE LEAD-BASED PAINT HAZARD - PAINT THAT TESTED POSITIVE FOR LEAD CONTENT AND THAT IS PEELING OR ON A DETERIORATED SUBSURFACE - USING WORK PRACTICES SET FORTH IN 28 RCNY §11-06(B)(2) 1st DOOR FRAME FROM EAST AT SOUTH WALL, SOUTH WALL, WEST WALL IN THE 1st ROOM FROM NORTH AT EAST LOCATED AT APT 1R, 1st STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM WEST AT NORTH
